{{Infobox location
| name = Blue facility
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Blue facility]] is a location where [[Doctor Cryce]] and [[Jan]] go.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9">''The Knight'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Blue facility]] is a massive square building with no windows.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The word 'BLUE' is stenciled on the side of the [[Blue facility]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“Now, why don’t the both of you come join me in the Blue facility?”<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
